links.title: Arrest Yalova Cat Abuser
links.mailtoSubject: Hayvan İstismarı Konusunda Soruşturma Talebi/Request For An Investigation Into Animal Abuse
links.description:
SEND THE ONE-CLICK EMAIL IN MY BIO TO YALOVA AUTHORITIES TITLED "ARREST YALOVA CAT ABUSER"❗️

Call:
Yalova Valiliği: +90 226 811 5069
Yalova Emniyet Müdürlüğü: +90 226 811 3000
Yalova Belediyesi Call Center: +90 552 505 7777

Apparently throwing cats out of multi-storey apartment windows passes for comedy in Turkey.
Let's see if they're still laughing when the cops show up at their door.

#yalova #turkey #dogsofinstagram

links.mailtoBody:
İlgili makamlara,

Yaygın olarak paylaşılan bir videoda da görüldüğü üzere, Yalova’da bir kedinin üst kattaki bir apartman penceresinden kasten aşağı atıldığı korkunç hayvan istismarı olayını bildirmek amacıyla bu mektubu yazıyorum. Faillerin derhal tespit edilmesini, tutuklanmasını ve Türkiye’nin 5199 sayılı Hayvanları Koruma Kanunu uyarınca en ağır şekilde yargılanmasını talep ediyorum.

Lütfen acil bir soruşturma başlatın ve kamuoyunu gelişmelerden haberdar edin.

Video kanıtı: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gyLWTL8IkNGvHFUrrZSgEm90eIo-bjyC/view?usp=sharing

Saygılarımızla,



@HallieForAnimals Ekibi
contact@hallieforanimals.org




To whom it may concern,

I am writing to report the horrific animal cruelty incident in Yalova in which a cat was deliberately thrown from an upper-floor apartment window, as seen in a widely shared video. I demand that the perpetrators be immediately identified, arrested, and prosecuted to the fullest extent under Turkey’s Animal Protection Law No. 5199.

Please launch an urgent investigation and keep the public informed of the progress.

Video evidence: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gyLWTL8IkNGvHFUrrZSgEm90eIo-bjyC/view?usp=sharing

Sincerely,



@HallieForAnimals Team
contact@hallieforanimals.org
links.callScript: I'm calling to report a severe case of animal cruelty in Yalova where a cat was thrown from an upper-floor apartment window, as shown in the viral video. I demand that the authorities immediately identify, arrest, and prosecute the individuals responsible under Turkey's Animal Protection Law 5199.

links.title: Locate & Arrest Quito Cat Abuser
links.mailtoSubject: Denuncia de maltrato animal grave: solicitud de investigación inmediata/Report of Severe Animal Cruelty: Request for Immediate Investigation
links.description:
SEND THE ONE-CLICK EMAIL IN MY LINKTREE TO QUITO AUTHORITES TITLED "LOCATE & ARREST QUITO CAT ABUSER"❗️

Call:
UBA/Municipality: +593 180 051 0510 ext 7
Fiscalía: +593 180 033 5486

Location: The intersection of Azogues and Shuaras St, Quito, Ecuador.

There no act more cowardly than attacking a sleeping animal. This is textbook sociopathic behavior. This "man" is a danger to every living creature around him.

#ecuador #quito #catlover
links.descriptionLong:
SEND THE ONE-CLICK EMAIL IN MY LINKTREE TO QUITO AUTHORITES TITLED "LOCATE & ARREST QUITO CAT ABUSER"❗️

Call:
UBA/Municipality: +593 180 051 0510 ext 7
Fiscalía: +593 180 033 5486

Location: The intersection of Azogues and Shuaras St, Quito, Ecuador.

There no act more cowardly than attacking a sleeping animal. This is textbook sociopathic behavior. This "man" is a danger to every living creature around him.

#ecuador #quito #catlover
links.mailtoBody:
A quien corresponda:

El 13 de mayo de 2026, a las 7:04 a. m., una cámara de seguridad captó a un hombre levantando violentamente a un gato que dormía y arrojándolo con fuerza al suelo en la intersección de las calles Azogues y Shuaras, en el sector La Florida, Quito.
El video muestra claramente el rostro del agresor y no es más que una prueba documentada de maltrato animal.
 
Exigimos:

1: Una investigación inmediata.
2: La identificación del agresor.
3: Su detención y el enjuiciamiento penal con todo el peso de la ley.

Esto constituye una clara violación de las leyes de protección animal de Ecuador.

Prueba en video: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1nJO0kjYM2FOu3y1gqiW3z7hzYm9zQPGc/view?usp=sharing

Atentamente,



Equipo de @HallieForAnimals
contact@hallieforanimals.org



To whom it may concern,

A man was caught on security camera violently picking up a sleeping cat and throwing it hard onto the ground at the intersection of Calle Azogues y Shuaras, La Florida sector, Quito on May 13, 2026 at 7:04 AM.
The video clearly shows the perpetrator’s face and is nothing other than documented animal cruelty.
 
We demand:

1: An immediate investigation.
2: Identification of the abuser.
3: An arrest and criminal charges to the fullest extent the law will allow.

This is a clear violation of Ecuador’s animal protection laws.

Video evidence: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1nJO0kjYM2FOu3y1gqiW3z7hzYm9zQPGc/view?usp=sharing

Sincerely,



@HallieForAnimals Team
contact@hallieforanimals.org
links.callScript: I'm calling to report a clear case of animal cruelty in northern Quito. On May 13, 2026, at approximately 7:04 AM at the intersection of Calle Azogues y Shuaras (La Florida sector), a man picked up a sleeping cat and threw it violently to the ground. Clear security camera footage showing his face and the entire incident is being shared widely on social media. We urgently request an investigation, identification, and legal action against the perpetrator.
